## Type of Change

<!-- Check the boxes that apply. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 🔨 Refactor (no functional changes, code quality improvement)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation (changes to docs only)
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to break)
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / infrastructure (CI, deps, configs)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (`ruff check` / `npm run lint` passes)
- [ ] I have added tests for my changes
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally
- [ ] I have updated the relevant documentation
- [ ] I have reviewed my own diff and removed debug code / commented-out blocks
- [ ] For API changes: I've updated OpenAPI schemas / docstrings
